name: Nine of Pentacles

standard.meaning: This is a time of abundance and material comfort. Enjoy yourself.
standard.reversedMeaning: A time when self discipline and caution is needed, tread carefully.
standard.personalMeaning: Above all, this card is about comfort. A reminder to occasionally kick back and indulge yourself, especially after a period of hard work. A signal to expend some time or money on creating a home or revisiting your hobbies.
standard.personalReversedMeaning: If upright is about indulging yourself, this is is a signal to rein it in. Considering sitting your ass down and figuring out a plan to work towards a goal that needs accomplishing rather than spending another night in front of the tv with a snack.

daily.dailyReversedMeaning: Don't treat yourself. Rein yourself in and practice some discipline, find value and self worth through denial rather than indulgence.

positional.familyAndFriends: Your home is your castle, your loved ones are a source of great joy.
positional.futureMeaning: You'll soon feel the pull of a better life, consider investing in creating a better future for yourself.
positional.hopesAndFearsMeaning: In the end, all you really want is to be independent, wanting for nothing.
positional.influencesMeaning: You feel pride in your accomplishments and independence.
positional.negativeMeaning: You have high standards and too strong of a focus on material wealth.
positional.obstacleMeaning: You are relaxing and indulging yourself too much rather than pushing towards your goals.
positional.pastMeaning: In the past, you've experienced times of comfort, which may have turned you soft and unequipped for the future.
positional.possibleOutcome: You may experience an unexpected opportunity.
positional.presentMeaning: You're going through a time of comfort and peace and should take the time to enjoy it while it lasts.
positional.recentMeaning: You've been sitting around long enough, it's time to get to work.

subject.adviceMeaning: A reminder to occasionally take time for yourself and relax.
subject.careerMeaning: Expect the profits to come rolling in.
subject.financeMeaning: Invest in yourself. Work towards creating a life of abundance.
subject.healthMeaning: You're reaping the rewards of hard work. Recovery has either been reached or is on the way.
subject.loveMeaning: If single, consider examining your standards, because they may be too high. If in a relationship, those high standards paid off and you have everything you want, even if you don't currently realize it.

lyric:
Always believe in your soul
You've got the power to know
You're indestructible, always believing
'Cause you are gold - Spandau Ballet
